## Summary

What changed?

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Security hardening
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:unit`
- [ ] `npm run stress:runtime`
- [ ] Manual CLI/runtime check

## Security

- [ ] File writes/deletes stay inside expected project, store, or installer paths
- [ ] No tokens or secrets are logged
- [ ] No new `eval`, `new Function`, or unsafe shell execution
- [ ] Updater, installer, and package-manager behavior was reviewed if touched

## Notes

Anything reviewers should know?
